summary: solana-key-utils ships base64-decoded payload with wallet-key handling shape
details: Package presents itself as a Solana key utility. index.js contains multiple Buffer.from(..., 'base64') decode operations at lines 52, 85, and 141 alongside string-conversion primitives, consistent with obfuscated payload reconstruction embedded in a package whose declared purpose gives it legitimate access to caller-supplied private key / seed / mnemonic material. Combined with the package name and stated scope, the base64-decoded content in a Solana key-handling module fits the wallet-secret interception and exfiltration shape rather than routine encoding of on-chain data.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
